name: TranslationPolicyGate

neutralConcepts: inline call from T666 Step 2 — not an HTTP endpoint
permitted IFF locale in freedom_config['i18n.enabledLocales'] OR xiigen-translation-requests has doc for (tenantId, locale)
tenantId from ALS — no parameter override (CF-810)
English ('en') always permitted — it is the bundle fallback path
NEVER throws — any fabric error → DataProcessResult.success(false) (CF-812)
denied → caller renders { fallback: true, locale: 'en' } at HTTP layer

ironRules.rule: This gate NEVER throws. All fabric errors → success(false). Callers render the fallback response shape.

keywords: translation policy gate validation inline permitted enabledLocales never throws fallback FLOW-48
